headline: Steak Escape Chooses Square to Modernize its 23 Locations Amid Transformation
summary: DISTRIBUTED-WORKFORCE/OAKLAND, Calif., March 26, 2026--Steak Escape, the quick-service restaurant (QSR) concept beloved for its fresh-grilled cheesesteaks and made-to-order grill line, has selected Square as its unified commerce platform powering its 23 locations. With a growing franchise network including drive-thru restaurants, Steak Escape is investing in modern infrastructure to support its next phase of expansion. headline: US filings for jobless aid tick up last week to 210,000 but remain at historically healthy levels
summary: The number of Americans applying for jobless aid inched up last week as employers continue to retain workers despite a labor market that has weakened considerably in the past year.  U.S. applications for jobless aid for the week ending March 21 rose by 5,000 to 210,000 from the previous week’s 205,000, the Labor Department reported Thursday.  Filings for unemployment benefits are considered representative of U.S. layoffs and are close to a real-time indicator of the health of the job market.

headline: The Future Doesn't Carry Cash: Top Mobile Payments Stocks to Buy
summary: Cash is fading fast, and mobile payments are taking over everything from retail checkouts to cross-border transfers. JPMorgan Chase, Block, Jack Henry and Remitly are positioned to ride the boom.
